title: Bare Necessities Prior Scrape Verification

metadata.purpose: Record the Bare Necessities artifact verification, no-rescrape decision, S3 sync, git wrap-up, and transcript upload.

messages.text: Asked to check Bare Necessities before doing anything else, inspect the prior claim, output directory, and non-Amazon scrape summary, and avoid rescraping if the prior completed scrape was already valid. Known prior status to verify: completed bounded full/rescue Bare Necessities scrape on 2026-05-05; products_scanned=1000; output rows=19; qualified rows=9; public Yotpo aggregate/product endpoints.

Inspected /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM/FWM_Data/non-amazon/data/step_1_raw_scraping_data/_claims/barenecessities_com.txt, the Bare Necessities output directory, and /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM/FWM_Data/non-amazon/data/reports/non_amazon_merchant_scrape_summary.csv before considering any scrape work.

Verified the completed claim exists and says: completed bounded full/rescue Bare Necessities scrape on 2026-05-05; products_scanned=1000; output rows=19; qualified rows=9; public Yotpo aggregate/product endpoints.

Verified the Bare Necessities output directory contains barenecessities_com_reviews_matching_intake_schema.csv and barenecessities_com_reviews_matching_intake_schema_summary.json. The CSV is readable and has 19 data rows. The summary JSON is readable and reports rows_written=19, supabase_qualified_rows=9, products_scanned=1000, product_pages_scanned=1000, full_catalog_scrape_complete=true, aggregate_feed_used=true, and errors=[].

Verified the non-Amazon merchant scrape summary contains the Bare Necessities row with rows_scraped=19, rows_with_image_product_and_measurement=9, products_discovered=1000, product_pages_scanned=1000, full_catalog_scrape_complete=True, aggregate_feed_used=True, and latest_fetched_or_finished_at=2026-05-05T19:43:38Z.

Decided not to rescrape. There was no active claim, no missing/corrupt/incomplete artifact, and no obvious need for a new adapter because the prior public Yotpo aggregate/product endpoint scrape completed cleanly and produced qualified rows. Noted one harmless artifact oddity: the summary JSON's output_csv field contains a Windows path from the originating environment, while the local report points to the valid local CSV path.
Asked to update remote git, S3, and the transcripts table.

Prepared this focused transcript for upload to the Supabase codex_chat_transcripts table, planned to sync /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM/FWM_Data to the configured S3 bucket, and planned to commit/push only this Bare Necessities verification transcript while leaving unrelated dirty worktree changes untouched.

next_steps: No Bare Necessities scrape follow-up is needed unless the existing artifact is later found missing, corrupt, incomplete, or stale for a newly defined requirement.
